title: Billie Eilish: Live at the O2 (Extended Cut)
original_title: Billie Eilish: Live at the O2 (Extended Cut)
overview: For the first time in her career, global superstar Billie Eilish is releasing a visual record of her formidable live performance. Featuring intimate and unforgettable moments between Billie and her audience, this compelling concert film takes viewers on a visually captivating journey from beginning to end, to the heart of Eilish's record-breaking sold-out Happier Than Ever, The World Tour.
